description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe, predominantly white with beige and black accents, designed for sports or active urban use. The upper is constructed from synthetic leather and mesh, providing both durability and breathability, while the midsole and outsole are made of rubber for cushioning and grip. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with beige laces, complemented by a Velcro strap at the top for added ankle support. The side panels display a bold, black Asics logo, and there are visible signs of wear and discoloration, especially around the toe and heel areas. The collar and tongue are padded for comfort, and the outsole appears to have a textured pattern for traction. Logos and branding are present on the side, tongue, and heel, indicating its Asics origin.
description: A high-top, white and beige athletic shoe with black Asics branding, Velcro strap, and visible signs of wear. Features padded collar, criss-cross laces, and a textured rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Asics logo, beige laces, Velcro strap, and visible wear on the toe and heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the toe box, lacing system, Velcro strap, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the Asics logo, Velcro strap, and less visible wear compared to the outer side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar, heel logo, and some scuffing on the heel area.
attribute_logo: Black Asics logo on both sides, blue and white logo on tongue, blue and white shield logo on heel.
